power.method: Rechargeable battery; USB-C DC 5V/2A, power bank, or Imou solar panel

release_notes: Base model of the Cell 3 series. Imou's official product page is JavaScript-rendered and did not expose a spec table; resolution (3MP/2K, 2304x1296) is taken from the Cell 3 series documentation and retailer listings and should be confirmed against the official datasheet.

frigate.notes: 100% wire-free battery camera — it sleeps between events and does not expose a continuous local RTSP stream, so Frigate/local-NVR use is not supported. Recording is via the Imou Life app + cloud and on-device microSD.
